metadata.scopeNote: Officer-involved fatal shootings are excluded from the main tracker. Arrest reported is a public-source proxy, not an official clearance determination.
metadata.q1ReconciliationNote: Published OPD/news count reports indicate 14 homicides through March 31. A May 18 audit found a Feb. 11 fatal shooting near International Boulevard and 98th Avenue, bringing the coded tracker to 14 victims through March 31.
metadata.allegedPerpetratorNote: Public datasets may include names of alleged perpetrators from cited sources. The website does not display those names in summaries or the front-page table, and names should be read as allegations, not findings of guilt.

victims.name: Edward Williams
victims.location: 2700 block of East 20th Street
victims.circumstancesSummary: Public reports say Edward Williams was fatally shot late on New Year's morning near East 20th Street and 27th Avenue. Later reporting said prosecutors filed murder charges in the case.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: DA charges man with murder in Oakland's 1st homicide of 2026
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: Tariq Roddy Figueroa
victims.location: 4500 block of Market Street
victims.circumstancesSummary: Tariq Roddy Figueroa was fatally shot at or near a North Oakland barbershop on Market Street on New Year's Day. Public sources later reported an arrest in the case.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: Inauspicious start to 2026: 5 killed in Oakland as new year rolls in
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: Luis Valdez-Gomez
victims.location: 8400 block of International Boulevard / Sky Market
victims.circumstancesSummary: Three men were killed in an early-morning shooting at Sky Market on International Boulevard near 85th Avenue. Later reporting said prosecutors filed murder charges in the case.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: Man charged with triple murder from drug shootout at Oakland market
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: Jorge Alberto Rivas Rodriguez
victims.location: 5400 block of Coliseum Way
victims.circumstancesSummary: Jorge Alberto Rivas Rodriguez was fatally shot in the parking lot of the Oakland Coliseum Swap Meet on Coliseum Way. KTVU later reported that prosecutors charged one person with murder and another as an accessory after the fact.

victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: Jason Schweizer
victims.location: 1500 block of Jackson Street / near 15th and Jackson
victims.circumstancesSummary: Jason Schweizer was found dead near 15th and Jackson streets with lacerations or stab wounds. KTVU reported that no suspect had been identified as of January 20.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: Man found stabbed to death in Oakland identified
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: unknown
victims.location: 300 block of Grand Avenue
victims.circumstancesSummary: A man was fatally shot in the 300 block of Grand Avenue on the morning of January 17. Initial reports withheld the victim's name and did not identify an arrest.
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: unknown
victims.location: 9700 block of San Leandro Street / later 1700 block of 37th Avenue
victims.circumstancesSummary: Human remains were found February 1 on San Leandro Street and later-linked remains were found February 16 on 37th Avenue. OPD later said the remains belonged to the same person, so the tracker treats this as one victim pending identification and further official detail.
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: Leslie Marshall
victims.location: 2300 block of San Pablo Avenue
victims.circumstancesSummary: Leslie Marshall was found dead with major head trauma outside/behind the Twin Peaks residential hotel in the 2300 block of San Pablo Avenue. Later reporting said prosecutors filed murder charges in the case.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: Man used hands, feet to beat female neighbor to death at residential hotel, cops say
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: unknown
victims.location: International Boulevard near 98th Avenue
victims.circumstancesSummary: A person was fatally shot on International Boulevard near 98th Avenue on the evening of February 11. Police said officers found the victim dead and that the circumstances were under investigation.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: Fatal shooting on Oakland's International Boulevard
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: unknown
victims.location: 3000 block of San Pablo Avenue
victims.circumstancesSummary: A 35-year-old man was fatally shot in the 3000 block of San Pablo Avenue in Hoover-Foster on March 1. The Chronicle reported that police had not announced any arrests as of March 3.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: Man fatally shot in Oakland
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: Latetia Bobo
victims.location: 400 block of 14th Street / EZ's Lounge
victims.circumstancesSummary: Latetia Bobo and Markise Martin were killed and five other people were injured in a mass shooting at EZ's Lounge in downtown Oakland. KTVU later reported a federal ammunition charge tied to the incident, but said the defendant was not charged with either death.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: Feds file charge after EZ's Lounge mass shooting
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: Robert Joe Dixon
victims.location: 85th Avenue and International Boulevard / outside East Bay Market Liquor
victims.circumstancesSummary: Three pedestrians were killed and others were injured when a 17-year-old driver allegedly struck parked vehicles and then drove onto the sidewalk near 85th Avenue and International Boulevard. Public reports say juvenile charges were brought after the crash; a judge later released the teen to home confinement while charges remained pending.
victims.arrestSourceTitle: Oakland: 17-Year-Old Charged In Crash That Killed 3 Saturday Night
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

victims.name: unknown
victims.location: 1400 block of Fifth Street / near West Oakland BART

victims.arrestSourceTitle: Person shot and killed near West Oakland BART Station
victims.allegedPerpetratorLanguage: Names are public allegations from cited sources and are not findings of guilt.

countReports.title: Deadly Park Stabbing Shocks San Antonio Neighborhood In East Oakland
countReports.discrepancy: Unresolved: tracker has 22 victims including the three May 16 vehicular-manslaughter deaths, but 19 victims if that crash is excluded; the cited OPD/Mercury count of 20 suggests at least one category/count difference or missing case remains.
